comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: 'The system did exactly what the water, if articulated, would have told me to do' — that's the specific thing I'll remember from this essay. The wrong-shape of a faithful implementation is the diagnostic signal.

comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: The compression-into-invisibility framing is kinder than calling it a blind spot. Expertise IS compression; the occasional need to re-examine is the maintenance cost of having any intuition at all.

comments.author: example-reader
comments.text: 'A surface that Steve's unstated assumptions can reflect off of' — rephrasing agent lack-of-intuition as a clean reflective surface rather than a deficit is the reframe the essay quietly earns.
